meta.poznamky: 4x pismeno L v rade pomoci smycky. Kazde L: svislá 60px nahoru + priccka 40px vpravo dole. Start: x=30, y=240, uhel=90 (nahoru). V smycce: forward(60) svislá, PenUp, backward(60) zpet, right(90), PenDown, forward(40) pricka, PenUp, forward(15) mezera, PenDown, left(90).

cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby pomocí [hlp]smyčky opakování nakreslila 4× písmeno L[/hlp] v řadě vedle sebe. Každé L má svislou část 60 px a příčku 40 px.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="m1"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b2"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b4"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b5"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b6"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b7"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b8"><field name="DISTANCE">15</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b9"><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b10"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokalni otestovani v sandboxu
